name: cc-edge-claude-code-otel
author: VisiCore Tech - CriblPacks@VisiCoreTech.com
description: This Cribl Edge Pack collects Claude Code telemetry from two sources — session log files (.jsonl transcripts) via a file monitor and operational metrics/logs via OpenTelemetry (OTLP/gRPC) — and forwards them to a Cribl Stream worker group for indexing, analysis, and search.
